title: Italy’s New Citizenship Laws Spark Outrage | 10 News
description: Italy is restricting who can obtain citizenship in a move that’s upsetting some expats.   Under the new rules, you can only claim citizenship if a parent or grandparent is born in Italy, and that relative must not be a dual citizen. title: US Coast Guard Rescues Snowmobiler Stranded On Ice In Michigan | 10 News
description: A snowmobile operator, who became stranded amid broken ice off Mackinac Island in Michigan, has been brought to safety after a dramatic rescue by the US Coast Guard on Sunday.  It’s understood the snowmobiler had been previously advised by authorities not to go out in the elements as "conditions were worse than a whiteout."  The man is now reported to be in stable condition after receiving medical care. title: UAE Closes Airspace As Nation Faces Missile Threats From Iran | 10 News
description: The United Arab Emirates has once again closed its airspace.  Only hours after Etihad and Emirates were allowed to operate again, after another airspace-ban was lifted.   The UAE's Civil Aviation Authority announced the full and temporary closure as an "exceptional precautionary measure" as the country faces threats of incoming missile and drone attacks from Iran.
